task: M71 corrected extended three-block Monte Carlo
description: Extended MC aligned with the three active figure blocks after M71. Uses the same M66 unit-variance projected GMM evaluator with no B21 sign restriction and candidate-specific pointwise weights.

configuration.set_size_measure: accepted projection share on the displayed (B11,B21) grid
configuration.weighting: candidate-specific pointwise covariance estimates for each tested B or (B,lambda) candidate
configuration.weight_regularization: symmetric covariance eigensystem with eigenvalue floor max(max_eigenvalue, 1) * 1e-10
configuration.inference_caveat: Pointwise chi-square diagnostics only; final projected critical values remain M65 follow-up.

blocks.name: sample_size_grid
blocks.label: Sample-size grid
blocks.note: Matches Figure 3: residual noise and structural non-Gaussianity are fixed while T varies.
